[戾]
Ideogrammic compound ( 會意 / 会意 ): a dog 犬 bending to enter through a door 戶 – to bend over. Extended to mean crooked, deviant, contrary.

[戻]
Simplified from 戾 . Ideogrammic compound ( 會意 / 会意 ): semantic 戶 ( “ door ” ) + semantic 犬 ( “ dog ” ) . It depicts a dog twisting its body to slip under a door, which came to convey the meanings “to return” or “to reach/arrive.” The modern commonly used character is a simplified form. [ 1 ]
